# Frame Loop

Add a Unity-inspired per-frame lifecycle to any class using `[MonoBehaviour]` — works in **console apps** too (no GUI required).

---

## Step 1 — Install

```shell
dotnet add package VeloxDev.Core
```

## Step 2 — Paste into `Program.cs`

```csharp
using VeloxDev.MonoBehaviour;
using VeloxDev.TimeLine;

// A class with per-frame lifecycle — generated by [MonoBehaviour]
[MonoBehaviour(channel: "demo", fps: 30)]
public partial class MyBehaviour
{
    private int _frameCount;

    private void Awake()
    {
        Console.WriteLine("Awake — behaviour initialized");
    }

    private void Start()
    {
        Console.WriteLine("Start — first frame");
    }

    private void Update(FrameEventArgs e)
    {
        _frameCount++;
        if (_frameCount % 30 == 0) // log every ~1 second at 30 FPS
        {
            Console.WriteLine(
                $"Frame {_frameCount} | Δ={e.DeltaTime.TotalMilliseconds:F0}ms " +
                $"| Total={e.TotalTime.TotalSeconds:F1}s");
        }
    }

    private void LateUpdate(FrameEventArgs e)
    {
        // Runs after every Update, same frame
    }

    private void FixedUpdate(FrameEventArgs e)
    {
        // Fixed-rate tick (default ~60 FPS, independent of Update FPS)
    }
}

var behaviour = new MyBehaviour();

// Register and start the channel
MonoBehaviourManager.RegisterBehaviour(behaviour, "demo");
MonoBehaviourManager.Start("demo");

Console.WriteLine("Frame loop running. Press Enter to stop.");
Console.ReadLine();

await MonoBehaviourManager.StopAsync("demo");
Console.WriteLine("Stopped.");
```

## Step 3 — Run

```shell
dotnet run
```

Output (sampled):
```
Awake — behaviour initialized
Start — first frame
Frame 30 | Δ=33ms | Total=1.0s
Frame 60 | Δ=33ms | Total=2.0s
```

## Channel Control

```csharp
MonoBehaviourManager.Pause("demo");          // Pause all behaviours on channel
MonoBehaviourManager.Resume("demo");          // Resume
MonoBehaviourManager.SetTargetFPS(60, "demo"); // Change FPS at runtime
MonoBehaviourManager.SetTimeScale(2.0f, "demo"); // 2× speed
```

## FrameEventArgs

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `DeltaTime` | `TimeSpan` | Time since last frame |
| `TotalTime` | `TimeSpan` | Time since channel start |
| `CurrentFPS` | `int` | Actual frames per second |
| `TargetFPS` | `int` | Target FPS for this channel |
